title: YRT – Touched
description: Generate a Touched character — their social class and supernatural features in the Yrt setting.

value.description: Small animal manifestations that are concealable or correctable through surgery or magic.
Noticeable deviations with 1–3 major manifestations, diminished but not correctable through surgery or magic.
Gross, uncorrectable or non-symmetric manifestations affecting 4–6 body parts.
More beast than man, including those affected in their mind only.
